title: Botocore exceptions must be explicitly caught and handled
description: Exceptions from the Boto3 client should be explicitly caught and handled.
message: Botocore exceptions should be explicitly caught and handled.
recommendation: Catch and handle botocore exceptions explicitly.

noncompliant.code:
import boto3
client = boto3.client('s3')
s3.get_object(Bucket='mybucket', Key='myobject')

why_is_this_an_issue: Exceptions are an essential part of managing errors in your application. Not handling them could lead to unpredictable outcomes in your application.
how_to_fix: Catch the exception and handle it appropriately.
